---
title: "Detection and analysis"
---

This part covers the **perception** problem: detecting the relevant objects in
each frame and turning them into usable information. Because public datasets for
the game are limited, the focus is on **techniques to maximize detection
accuracy**, with all training and inference kept **local**.

::: {.callout-note}
## Work in progress
The sections of this part will be added as the work progresses.
:::
